title: CRUK footer — crukFooter
text: div containing styled footer links logos

title: CRUK footer — crukFooter
code: crukFooter() #> Warning: file("") only supports open = "w+" and open = "w+b": using the former #> Error in if (!grepl("^<!DOCTYPE html>|<html", lines, ignore.case = TRUE)) {    return(FALSE)}: argument is of length zero

title: Page Title — crukTitle
text: Title title text display h1 Subheading subheading text display h2

title: Page Title — crukTitle
text: div containing title, subheading horizontal rule CRUK styling

title: Page Title — crukTitle
code:
crukTitle("Cancer Incidence") #>
#>

Cancer Incidence

#> #>
#>
crukTitle( "Incidence for common cancers", "Latest cancer incidence statistics for the years 2017-2019" ) #>
#>

Incidence for common cancers

#> Latest cancer incidence statistics for the years 2017-2019 #>
#>

title: Health Professional Last Review — hpReview
text: last_review_date date display last date page content reviewed

title: Health Professional Last Review — hpReview
text: div containing styled health professional box date last review

title: Health Professional Last Review — hpReview
code:
hpReview("08 July 2025") #>
#> Health professionals #>
#> Last reviewed: 08 July 2025 #>
